articles.headline: The Evolution of Aviation SMS

articles.takeaway: Modern SMS shifts accountability from post-accident investigation to continuous risk identification, fundamentally changing how airlines prevent incidents before they occur.

articles.headline: No Transponder, No Warning: NTSB Details LaGuardia Alert Failure
articles.blurb: NTSB says LaGuardia’s surface warning system was "unable to alert."

articles.headline: Flying in the Unforgiving Wire Environment (The Rotorcraft Collective)

articles.blurb: Passenger airline pilots can earn more, but being a cargo pilot is also a lucrative career.
articles.takeaway: Cargo pilots command competitive salaries despite fewer career development opportunities, making the niche sector increasingly attractive to pilots seeking stability over traditional airline advancement paths.

articles.takeaway: IXPE's polarimetry data on ancient supernovae reveals magnetic field structures invisible to traditional X-ray observatories, enhancing understanding of high-energy astrophysical phenomena applicable to space weather prediction.

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization across three domains—airlines, airports, and flight operations—offers near-term emissions reductions without waiting for revolutionary new aircraft technologies.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
